headline: Hormel Foods Announces Agreement to Sell Ceratti Business in Brazil
summary: Hormel Foods Corporation (NYSE: HRL), a Fortune 500 global branded food company, today announced it has entered into a definitive agreement to sell its Brazilian operations, operated under the CERATTI® brand to Zanchetta Alimentos LTDA, a Brazilian food company with an established presence in the market.

headline: 3 Reasons to Sell HRL and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
summary: Hormel Foods trades at $26.16 and has moved in lockstep with the market. Its shares have returned 8.2% over the last six months while the S&P 500 has gained 6.8%.
